releaseNotes: Added Command Palette with Ctrl+Shift+P for quickly running editor commands.
Added Renderer Benchmark for measuring Canvas, Direct2D, OpenGL and Vulkan viewport performance.
Added Turkish language support with translated menus, panels, dialogs, popups, validation messages, splash/loading messages and release notes.
Added What's New in v1.5.0 popup that appears automatically only once.
Added Help menu entries for What's New, About HaxStudio and Join Discord.
Added Discord invite support in Help, About HaxStudio and What's New.
Improved About HaxStudio with renderer support, language support and current focus information.
Improved Image to Segment workflow with presets, remembered settings and preview variants.
Improved SVG import support for vector logos and segment conversion.
Added SVG Logo Simplifier v2 with SVG Detection Mode, Keep Details, tiny hole suppression, inner path cleanup, curved contour smoothing and cleaner ring/circle handling.
Added Text to Segment font support.
Improved Text to Segment so it remembers the latest used settings.
Added segment-based background drawing behind Text to Segment output.
Improved Layers panel workflow with copy coordinate and improved copy JSON behavior.
Improved Snap menu behavior with selectable/custom snap sizes and dark themed popup styling.
Improved status bar information for selected objects and editor state.
Improved toolbar layout by removing duplicated file buttons that already exist in the File menu.
Improved validation, cleanup and capacity reporting localization coverage.
Improved splash screen and stadium loading text localization.
Improved general UI polish, release notes, dialogs and bug fixes.
Fixed multiple Turkish localization gaps in validation panels, mirror popup, panels and runtime-created UI.
Fixed Discord menu build and icon compatibility issues.
Fixed multiple Image to Segment and SVG import edge cases found during v1.5.0 testing.
Updated HaxStudio UI version labels to 1.5.0.
Updated current focus to Stable v1.6.0 release.
